releaseNotesMarkdown:
## What's new in this update

### Forge Sync improvements

- Add Revit 2027 / net10.0-windows support (#1)
- Skip plugin Nuke GitRelease and build net10 forge tools in CI

### Forge Tools improvements

- Add Revit 2027 build support

### Plugin improvements

- Remove studpacks command; update import families
- Add UpdateServices.Update() to OnStartup method
- Add PT tributary calc & truss coping commands to ribbon
- Auto-publish beta source releases from builder branch
- Document builder-driven beta source publishing
- Fix builder beta branch compile for truss command
- Fix builder beta release automation
- Schedule suite updater after Revit shutdown
- Implement multi-version Revit plugin architecture with feedback, export, and web UI management modules
- Add Auto Dimension tool, grid/floor edge, detail import
- Builder
- Add Revit 2027 support
- Merge master into main
- Use 2026 RevitMCPSDK for 2027 builds
- Handle Revit 2027 curve intersection API

_(+ 2 internal/noise commit(s) hidden)_
